appDescription.message: Save growth ideas from any web page and turn them into launch posts, competitor notes, landing page copy, and pain point lists.

librarySubtitle.message: Search, filter, edit, copy, and delete saved clips.

exportSubtitle.message: Generate Markdown from saved project clips.

noProjectPlaceholder.message: Create a project and save clips before exporting.

popupStatusPageCannotSave.message: This page cannot be saved. Copy text manually into the library.

popupStatusSavedDuplicate.message: Saved. This URL was already in the project.

guideSubtitle.message: Learn how to capture growth ideas and turn them into copywriting or competitor analysis notes.

guideText1.message: Simply highlight any text on a web page, right-click, and select "Save to GrowthVault" from the context menu. This will save the text clipping to your default project (Inbox).

guideText2.message: Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup interface. Here you can select a project and category (e.g. Value Proposition, Pain Point), type a quick note, and click "Save current page".

guideText3.message: Open the Library to search, filter by project/type/domain, edit the text/note directly, and save changes or copy/delete them.

guideText4.message: Click the "Export" navigation link, select a project and a markdown template (e.g., Competitor Analysis, Launch Post Draft), and copy the structured Markdown structure directly to your workspace.

saveSourceLabel.message: Review this clip before saving it.

saveStatusNoPending.message: No pending clip found. You can paste text manually.

settingsSubtitle.message: Manage your custom Markdown templates and data backup & restore.

settingsBackupText.message: Export all your projects, clips, and custom templates into a JSON file, or restore from a file.

settingsTemplatesText.message: Create and design your custom export layouts. Supported placeholders: {{projectName}} (Project Name), {{allClips}} (All Project Clips), or specific material types like {{competitor}}, {{idea}}, {{pain_point}} etc.

backupExportSuccess.message: Backup export complete! Download has started.

backupImportError.message: Import failed. The file is not a valid GrowthVault backup JSON.

templateDeleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this custom template?
